metadata.title: 雨巷里的来信
metadata.logline: A young archivist follows hidden letters through an abandoned theater to uncover why her father vanished.

characters.name: 林夏
characters.description: A careful young archivist who decides to continue her father's unfinished investigation.

characters.name: 周砚
characters.description: A former stage manager who reveals the old theater's hidden secret.

locations.name: 城南档案馆
locations.description: An old archive near a rain-soaked alley.

locations.name: 旧剧院
locations.description: A closed theater where one stage lamp still burns.

props.name: 没有编号的信
props.description: A mysterious letter written in the protagonist's father's hand.

props.name: 旧剧本
props.description: A theater script whose third act hides an address.

scenes.title: 第一幕 雨巷里的信
scenes.purpose: Turn chapter prose into a playable dramatic beat.

actions.text: 林夏进入场景，线索推动她继续追查。来源章节：1。

dialogues.line: 这条线索不是偶然留下的。

adaptation_notes: Compress prose exposition into visible action and concise dialogue.
